items.title: Sources: OpenAI appoints new leaders to oversee Stargate after deciding to rent more AI servers from cloud providers, and splits its computing effort in three (Anissa Gardizy/The Information)

items.title_en: Sources: OpenAI appoints new leaders to oversee Stargate after deciding to rent more AI servers from cloud providers, and splits its computing effort in three (Anissa Gardizy/The Information)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：OpenAI 在决定从云提供商租用更多人工智能服务器后，任命了新的领导者来监督 Stargate，并将其计算工作一分为三（Anissa Gardizy/The Information）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：OpenAI 在决定从云提供商租用更多人工智能服务器后，任命了新的领导者来监督 Stargate，并将其计算工作一分为三（Anissa Gardizy/The Information） / Sources: OpenAI appoints new leaders to oversee Stargate after deciding to rent more AI servers from cloud providers, and splits its computing effort in three (Anissa Gardizy/The Information)

items.title: Taiwan's chip sector faces critical supply risks as the island relies on the Middle East for 37% of its LNG and much of its helium and sulfur, amid the Iran war (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Taiwan's chip sector faces critical supply risks as the island relies on the Middle East for 37% of its LNG and much of its helium and sulfur, amid the Iran war (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Taiwan's chip sector faces critical supply risks as the island relies on the Middle East for 37% of its LNG and much of its helium and sulfur, amid the Iran war (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争期间，台湾 37% 的液化天然气以及大部分氦气和硫磺依赖中东，因此台湾芯片行业面临严重的供应风险 (彭博社)
items.title_bilingual: 伊朗战争期间，台湾 37% 的液化天然气以及大部分氦气和硫磺依赖中东，因此台湾芯片行业面临严重的供应风险 (彭博社) / Taiwan's chip sector faces critical supply risks as the island relies on the Middle East for 37% of its LNG and much of its helium and sulfur, amid the Iran war (Bloomberg)

items.title_bilingual: Apple 推出售价 549 美元的 AirPods Max 2，配备 H2 芯片、效率提高 1.5 倍的 ANC、录音室品质的录音和摄像头遥控器，将于 4 月初发货 (Apple) / Apple unveils $549 AirPods Max 2, offering an H2 chip, up to 1.5x more effective ANC, studio-quality audio recording, and camera remote, shipping in early April (Apple)

items.title: Chip cooling startup Frore, which designs channels that conduct liquid coolant in 3D shapes unique to each chip, raised $143M led by MVP at a $1.64B valuation (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Chip cooling startup Frore, which designs channels that conduct liquid coolant in 3D shapes unique to each chip, raised $143M led by MVP at a $1.64B valuation (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Chip cooling startup Frore, which designs channels that conduct liquid coolant in 3D shapes unique to each chip, raised $143M led by MVP at a $1.64B valuation (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 芯片冷却初创公司 Frore 设计了以每个芯片独特的 3D 形状传导液体冷却剂的通道，在 MVP 的带领下筹集了 1.43 亿美元，估值为 1.64B 美元（Dina Bass/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 芯片冷却初创公司 Frore 设计了以每个芯片独特的 3D 形状传导液体冷却剂的通道，在 MVP 的带领下筹集了 1.43 亿美元，估值为 1.64B 美元（Dina Bass/Bloomberg） / Chip cooling startup Frore, which designs channels that conduct liquid coolant in 3D shapes unique to each chip, raised $143M led by MVP at a $1.64B valuation (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

items.title: GovAI and Brookings: many of the people most at risk if AI transforms work are also the best placed to find new jobs, as researchers disagree over AI's impact (Washington Post)
items.title_original: GovAI and Brookings: many of the people most at risk if AI transforms work are also the best placed to find new jobs, as researchers disagree over AI's impact (Washington Post)
items.title_en: GovAI and Brookings: many of the people most at risk if AI transforms work are also the best placed to find new jobs, as researchers disagree over AI's impact (Washington Post)
items.title_zh: GovAI 和布鲁金斯学会：如果人工智能改变工作方式，许多面临最大风险的人也是找到新工作的最佳人选，因为研究人员对人工智能的影响存在分歧（华盛顿邮报）
items.title_bilingual: GovAI 和布鲁金斯学会：如果人工智能改变工作方式，许多面临最大风险的人也是找到新工作的最佳人选，因为研究人员对人工智能的影响存在分歧（华盛顿邮报） / GovAI and Brookings: many of the people most at risk if AI transforms work are also the best placed to find new jobs, as researchers disagree over AI's impact (Washington Post)

items.title: Amsterdam-based Nebius says Meta plans to spend up to $27B over five years for access to AI infrastructure, starting with $12B of capacity in early 2027 (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Amsterdam-based Nebius says Meta plans to spend up to $27B over five years for access to AI infrastructure, starting with $12B of capacity in early 2027 (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Amsterdam-based Nebius says Meta plans to spend up to $27B over five years for access to AI infrastructure, starting with $12B of capacity in early 2027 (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 总部位于阿姆斯特丹的 Nebius 表示，Meta 计划在五年内花费高达 270 亿美元用于访问人工智能基础设施，从 2027 年初开始提供 120 亿美元的容量（Kurt Wagner/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 总部位于阿姆斯特丹的 Nebius 表示，Meta 计划在五年内花费高达 270 亿美元用于访问人工智能基础设施，从 2027 年初开始提供 120 亿美元的容量（Kurt Wagner/彭博社） / Amsterdam-based Nebius says Meta plans to spend up to $27B over five years for access to AI infrastructure, starting with $12B of capacity in early 2027 (Kurt Wagner/Bloomberg)
